# @webamoki/web-svelte

> A Svelte 5 component library for SvelteKit providing type-safe forms (built on SvelteKit remote forms), UI components, and utilities.

- **Framework:** Svelte 5 (Runes) & SvelteKit
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS v4
- **Validation:** Zod (v4)
- **Forms:** SvelteKit remote forms (`@sveltejs/kit` `form`/`command`/`query`)

---

## Installation

```bash
pnpm add @webamoki/web-svelte
```

Peer dependencies: `svelte`, `@sveltejs/kit`, `zod`, `sveltekit-superforms`, `svelte-sonner`, `tailwindcss`, `@tailwindcss/forms`, `@tailwindcss/typography`, `@internationalized/date`

`sveltekit-superforms` is only required if you use the legacy `server/form-handler` or `server/form-processor` exports (see below). `svelte-sonner` is required by `Form` and `utils/command` for toast notifications.

---

## Exports

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/components/form`

Type-safe form components built on SvelteKit remote forms and Zod.

All scalar field components (`TextField`, `PasswordField`, `EmailField`, `NumberField`, `DateField`, `TimeField`, `HexColorField`) share this prop shape:

```ts
interface ScalarFieldProps<Input extends RemoteFormInput, T = string> {
  children?: Snippet; // rendered as the field's label
  form?: Omit<RemoteForm<Input, unknown>, 'for'> | RemoteForm<Input, unknown>; // omit for a standalone field
  name: keyof Input & string;
  onChange?: (value: T) => void; // standalone only, fired on native `change`
  onInput?: (value: T) => void;  // standalone only, fired on every keystroke
  optional?: boolean;
  schema?: ZodType; // standalone only, per-field validation
  bind:value?: T;   // standalone only
}
```

#### `Form`

Remote-form wrapper with schema validation, dirty tracking, and toast notifications on submit.

```svelte
<Form
  bind:dirty?: boolean
  class?: string
  defaults?: Partial<Input>
  enctype?: 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' | 'multipart/form-data'
  form: Omit<RemoteForm<Input, FormResult<Data>>, 'for'> | RemoteForm<Input, FormResult<Data>>
  hidden?: Partial<Input>
  onError?: (info: { data?: Data; message?: string }) => void
  onInput?: (event: Event) => void
  onSuccess?: (data: Data) => void
  onThrow?: (error: unknown) => void
  onWarning?: (info: { data?: Data; message?: string }) => void
  reset?: boolean
  schema: StandardSchemaV1<Input, unknown>
>
  {children}
</Form>
```

`reset` defaults to `true` (resets the form on a successful submit). `dirty` is bound `true` on any field change and reset to `false` on success. Submit results (`FormResult`, see `utils/form` below) are toasted automatically via `svelte-sonner`.

#### `Button`

Submit button with loading state, tied to a `RemoteForm`'s pending state when `form` is passed.

```svelte
<Button
  class?: string
  form?: Omit<RemoteForm<Input, unknown>, 'for'> | RemoteForm<Input, unknown>
  href?: string
  loading?: boolean
  loadingMessage?: string
  reset?: boolean
  variant?: 'default' | 'destructive' | 'ghost' | 'ghost-destructive' | (string & {})
>
  {children}
</Button>
```

`variant` defaults to `'default'`. When `href` is set, renders as a link styled like a button. When `form` is passed, loading state is driven by `form.pending > 0` (the standalone `loading` prop is ignored).

#### `TextField`

```svelte
<TextField
  {...scalarFieldProps}
  icon?: Component
  placeholder?: string
/>
```

#### `PasswordField`

Password input with show/hide toggle.

```svelte
<PasswordField
  {...scalarFieldProps}
  placeholder?: string
/>
```

#### `EmailField`

Text input with `type="email"`.

```svelte
<EmailField
  {...scalarFieldProps}
  placeholder?: string
/>
```

#### `NumberField`

```svelte
<NumberField
  {...scalarFieldProps}
  icon?: Component
  placeholder?: string
/>
```

#### `DateField`

Native `<input type="date">` bound to an ISO date string (`YYYY-MM-DD`). Pair with `formDate` from `utils/form` to parse to `CalendarDate` in the schema.

```svelte
<DateField {...scalarFieldProps} />
```

#### `TimeField`

Native `<input type="time">` bound to an ISO time string (`HH:mm`). Pair with `formTime` from `utils/form` to parse to `Time` in the schema.

```svelte
<TimeField {...scalarFieldProps} />
```

#### `DateRangeField`

Calendar-popover date range picker built on `bits-ui`'s `RangeCalendar`/`Popover`. Submits two separate field names.

```svelte
<DateRangeField
  children?: Snippet
  bind:endValue?: string
  endName: keyof Input & string
  endSchema?: ZodType
  form?: Omit<RemoteForm<Input, unknown>, 'for'> | RemoteForm<Input, unknown>
  onChange?: (range: { end: string; start: string }) => void
  optional?: boolean
  bind:startValue?: string
  startName: keyof Input & string
  startSchema?: ZodType
/>
```

#### `CheckboxField`

Checkbox field for boolean values.

```svelte
<CheckboxField
  bind:checked?: boolean
  children?: Snippet
  description?: string
  disabled?: boolean
  form?: Omit<RemoteForm<Input, unknown>, 'for'> | RemoteForm<Input, unknown>
  name: keyof Input & string
  onChange?: (value: boolean) => void
  optional?: boolean
  schema?: ZodType
/>
```

#### `PinField`

Numeric PIN input for 2FA verification, built on the shadcn input-otp primitive.

```svelte
<PinField
  children?: Snippet
  class?: string
  description?: string
  disabled?: boolean
  form?: Omit<RemoteForm<Input, unknown>, 'for'> | RemoteForm<Input, unknown>
  maxlength?: number
  name: keyof Input & string
  onChange?: (value: string) => void
  onInput?: (value: string) => void
  optional?: boolean
  schema?: ZodType
  bind:value?: string
/>
```

`maxlength` defaults to `6`. Pair with `formPin()` from `utils/form` for schema validation.

#### `SelectField`

Single-select dropdown.

```svelte
<SelectField
  children?: Snippet
  class?: string
  form?: Omit<RemoteForm<Input, unknown>, 'for'> | RemoteForm<Input, unknown>
  getKey: (item: I) => K
  getLabel: (item: I) => string
  getValue: (item: I) => V
  icon?: Component
  items: readonly I[]
  name: keyof Input & string
  nullable?: boolean
  onchange?: (value: V | undefined) => void
  optional?: boolean
  placeholder: string
  schema?: ZodType
  bind:value?: V
/>
```

`nullable` defaults to `false`.

#### `SliderField`

Single-thumb or dual-thumb range slider.

```svelte
<SliderField
  children?: Snippet
  disabled?: boolean
  form?: Omit<RemoteForm<Input, unknown>, 'for'> | RemoteForm<Input, unknown>
  highName?: keyof Input & string
  lowName?: keyof Input & string
  max?: number
  min?: number
  name?: keyof Input & string
  onChange?: (value: number | number[]) => void
  optional?: boolean
  range?: boolean
  schema?: ZodType
  showValue?: boolean
  step?: number
  bind:value?: number | number[]
/>
```

`min` defaults to `0`, `max` to `100`, `step` to `1`, `showValue` to `true`, `range` to `false`. In single mode, use `name` and `value: number`. In range mode (`range={true}`), use `lowName`/`highName` in form mode, and `value` becomes `[low, high]` in standalone mode.

#### `SwitchField`

Toggle switch for boolean values, with three visual variants.

```svelte
<SwitchField
  bind:checked?: boolean
  children?: Snippet
  description?: string
  disabled?: boolean
  form?: Omit<RemoteForm<Input, unknown>, 'for'> | RemoteForm<Input, unknown>
  name: keyof Input & string
  offLabel?: string
  onChange?: (value: boolean) => void
  onLabel?: string
  optional?: boolean
  schema?: ZodType
  variant?: 'button' | 'onoff' | 'switch'
/>
```

`variant` defaults to `'switch'` (sliding pill). `'onoff'` shows `offLabel`/`onLabel` text (defaults `"OFF"`/`"ON"`). `'button'` renders `children` as the label of a filled/outlined button.

#### `FileField`

File upload field.

```svelte
<FileField
  accept?: string
  children?: Snippet
  disabled?: boolean
  form?: Omit<RemoteForm<Input, unknown>, 'for'> | RemoteForm<Input, unknown>
  multiple?: boolean
  name: keyof Input & string
  onSelect?: (files: File[]) => void
  optional?: boolean
  schema?: ZodType
  variant?: 'button' | 'dropzone'
/>
```

`variant` defaults to `'button'`. Pair with `formFile` from `utils/form` for schema validation.

#### `MessageField`

Textarea for longer text input.

```svelte
<MessageField
  {...scalarFieldProps}
  class?: string
  defaultHeight?: number
  icon?: Component
  placeholder?: string
  resize?: boolean
/>
```

`defaultHeight` defaults to `100`. `resize` defaults to `false`.

#### `HexColorField`

Hex color picker field.

```svelte
<HexColorField {...scalarFieldProps} />
```

Pair with `formHexColor` from `utils/form` for schema validation.

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/components/form/fields`

Re-exports the field components above without `Form`/`Button`. Currently includes: `CheckboxField`, `DateField`, `DateRangeField`, `EmailField`, `FileField`, `HexColorField`, `MessageField`, `NumberField`, `PasswordField`, `PinField`, `SelectField`, `SwitchField`, `TextField`, `TimeField`.

`SliderField` is exported from `components/form` but not from this subpath (source inconsistency — import it from `components/form` if needed).

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/components/ui`

Higher-level UI components (standalone, not tied to a form).

#### `Input`

Standalone text input with optional icon.

```svelte
<Input
  class?: string
  icon?: Component
  iconPosition?: 'center' | 'top'
  type?: HTMLInputElement['type'] // 'file' excluded
  bind:value?: string
  {...HTMLInputAttributes}
/>
```

`iconPosition` defaults to `'center'`.

#### `TextArea`

Standalone textarea with optional icon.

```svelte
<TextArea
  class?: string
  defaultHeight?: number
  icon?: Component
  resize?: boolean
  bind:value?: string
  {...HTMLTextareaAttributes}
/>
```

`defaultHeight` defaults to `100`. `resize` defaults to `false`.

#### `DateInput`

Standalone native date input bound to `CalendarDate`.

```svelte
<DateInput
  class?: string
  icon?: Component
  showDate?: boolean
  bind:value?: CalendarDate
  {...HTMLInputAttributes}
/>
```

When `showDate` is true, renders the formatted full date below the input.

#### `Select`

Standalone single-select dropdown.

```svelte
<Select
  class?: string
  getKey: (item: I) => K
  getLabel: (item: I) => string
  getValue: (item: I) => V
  icon?: Component
  items: readonly I[]
  label?: string
  onchange?: (value: V | undefined) => void
  placeholder: string
  bind:value?: V
/>
```

#### `Checkbox`

Standalone checkbox (used internally by `CheckboxField`, also available standalone).

```svelte
<Checkbox
  bind:checked?: boolean
  children?: Snippet
  class?: string
  description?: string
  disabled?: boolean
  id?: string
  bind:indeterminate?: boolean
  name?: string
  onChecked?: () => void
  onCheckedChange?: (checked: boolean) => void
  onUnchecked?: () => void
  required?: boolean
  {...HTMLButtonAttributes}
/>
```

#### `Choice`

Standalone single-choice selector.

```svelte
<Choice
  getKey: (item: I) => K
  getLabel: (item: I) => string
  getValue: (item: I) => V
  items: readonly I[]
  buttonContent?: Snippet
  disabled?: boolean
  readonly?: boolean
  vertical?: boolean
  onChange?: (value: V) => void
  bind:value?: V
/>
```

#### `ChoiceMulti`

Standalone multi-choice selector.

```svelte
<ChoiceMulti
  getKey: (item: I) => K
  getLabel: (item: I) => string
  getValue: (item: I) => V
  items: readonly I[]
  buttonContent?: Snippet
  disabled?: boolean
  readonly?: boolean
  vertical?: boolean
  onAdd?: (value: V) => void
  onRemove?: (value: V) => void
  bind:value?: V[]
/>
```

#### `WeekdayChoice`

Single weekday selector with configurable labels.

```svelte
<WeekdayChoice
  class?: string
  disabled?: boolean
  letterLabels?: boolean
  longLabels?: boolean
  readonly?: boolean
  vertical?: boolean
  onChange?: (value: Day) => void
  bind:value?: Day
/>
```

#### `WeekdayChoiceMulti`

Multi-weekday selector with configurable labels.

```svelte
<WeekdayChoiceMulti
  class?: string
  disabled?: boolean
  letterLabels?: boolean
  longLabels?: boolean
  readonly?: boolean
  vertical?: boolean
  onAdd?: (value: Day) => void
  onRemove?: (value: Day) => void
  bind:value: Day[]
/>
```

#### `ContextMenu`

Right-click context menu.

```svelte
<ContextMenu onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void>
  <ContextMenuTrigger>
    {children}
  </ContextMenuTrigger>
  <ContextMenuContent class?: string>
    <ContextMenuItem onclick?: (e: MouseEvent) => void disabled?: boolean variant?: 'default' | 'destructive'>
      {children}
    </ContextMenuItem>
    <ContextMenuSeparator />
  </ContextMenuContent>
</ContextMenu>
```

#### `DragManager`

State manager for drag-and-drop operations.

```ts
class DragManager<T> {
  get isDragging(): boolean;
  get dragData(): T | null;
  drag(data: T): void;
  stop(): void;
}
```

#### `Draggable`

Makes content draggable.

```svelte
<Draggable class?: string data: T manager: DragManager<T>>
  {children}
</Draggable>
```

#### `Dropzone`

Drop target that validates and accepts dragged items.

```svelte
<Dropzone
  class?: string
  isDroppable: (data: T) => boolean
  manager: DragManager<T>
  onDrop: (data: T) => void
>
  {children}
</Dropzone>
```

#### `SearchBar`

Search input with icon and debounced change callback.

```svelte
<SearchBar
  class?: string
  defaultValue?: string
  onChange: (value: string) => void
  placeholder?: string
/>
```

#### `Sidebar`

Namespace re-export of the shadcn sidebar primitives (`Root`, `Provider`, `Content`, `Header`, `Footer`, `Group*`, `Menu*`, `Inset`, `Input`, `Rail`, `Separator`, `Trigger`, `useSidebar`), plus flat `Sidebar*`-prefixed aliases (e.g. `SidebarContent`). See shadcn-svelte sidebar docs for usage.

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/datetime`

Date/time utilities built on `@internationalized/date`.

#### Types

```ts
const Days: readonly ['Monday', 'Tuesday', 'Wednesday', 'Thursday', 'Friday', 'Saturday', 'Sunday'];
type Day = (typeof Days)[number];
const DayIndex: Record<Day, number>;
```

#### `LocalDateF`

Timezone-aware date functions.

```ts
class LocalDateF {
  constructor(timezone: string);
  today(): CalendarDate;
  now(): ZonedDateTime;
  isDateToday(date: CalendarDate): boolean;
  ageFromDob(dob: CalendarDate): number;
  dateWithin(date: CalendarDate, duration: DateDuration): boolean;
}
```

#### Date Functions

```ts
function getDayIndexOfDate(date: CalendarDate): number;
function getDayOfDate(date: CalendarDate): Day;
function isDateDay(date: CalendarDate, dayOfWeek: Day): boolean;
function checkOverlap(start1: Time, end1: Time, start2: Time, end2: Time): boolean;
function datesWithin(date1: CalendarDate, date2: CalendarDate, duration: DateDuration): boolean;
function getLastDateOfDay(dayOfWeek: Day, startDate: CalendarDate): CalendarDate;
function getLastDatesOfDay(dayOfWeek: Day, count: number, startDate: CalendarDate): CalendarDate[];
function getLastMonths(count: number, startDate: CalendarDate): CalendarDate[];
function getNextDateOfDay(dayOfWeek: Day, startDate: CalendarDate): CalendarDate;
function dateDiffWeeks(date1: CalendarDate, date2: CalendarDate): number;
```

#### Formatting

```ts
function formatDayLetter(day: Day): string;        // "Monday" -> "M"
function formatDayShort(day: Day): string;          // "Monday" -> "Mon"
function formatDateFull(date: CalendarDate): string; // "5 Oct 2023"
function formatDateISO(date: CalendarDate): string;  // "2023-10-05"
function formatDateNum(date: CalendarDate): string;  // "05/10/2023"
function formatDateShort(date: CalendarDate): string; // "Oct 5"
function formatMonth(date: CalendarDate): string;    // "Oct 23"
function formatAbsolute(datetime: ZonedDateTime): string; // "05/10/2023 14:30:00"
function formatTime(time: Time): string;             // "14:30"
function formatTimeEnd(timeStart: Time, durationMinutes: number): string;
function formatTimeFull(time: Time): string;         // "14:30:00"
```

#### State Handling

```ts
function unfreezeDate(raw: ReturnType<typeof $state.snapshot<CalendarDate>>): CalendarDate;
function unfreezeTime(raw: ReturnType<typeof $state.snapshot<Time>>): Time;
function unfreezeAbsoluteDate(raw: ReturnType<typeof $state.snapshot<ZonedDateTime>>): ZonedDateTime;
```

#### Transport

```ts
const dateTransport: Transport;
```

SvelteKit `Transport` for `CalendarDate`, `Time`, and `ZonedDateTime` serialization/deserialization.

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/zod`

Common Zod (v4) validators and helpers. Import from `zod/v4` directly for the rest of Zod's API.

#### Validators

```ts
const IntegerId: z.ZodNumber;          // z.int().min(1)
const Phone: z.ZodString;              // allows "+", digits, and spaces
const HexColor: z.ZodString;           // 3 or 6 hex digit color (without #)
const Day: z.ZodEnum;                  // enum of weekday names
const Time: z.ZodType<Time>;           // instanceof @internationalized/date Time
const CalendarDate: z.ZodType<CalendarDate>; // instanceof @internationalized/date CalendarDate

function trimTo<T extends z.ZodType<string, string>>(typeTo: T): z.ZodPipe<z.ZodString, T>;
```

`trimTo` creates a schema that trims whitespace before applying the inner validation.

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/env`

Public (client-safe) environment variable validation, backed by `$env/dynamic/public`. Result is validated once and cached.

```ts
function makePublic<S extends ZodRawShape>(schema: ZodObject<S>): () => z.infer<ZodObject<S>>;
const Env: { makePublic: typeof makePublic };
```

Throws on validation failure with a joined `path: message` list.

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/server/env`

Private (server-only) environment variable validation. Prefers Cloudflare Workers `platform.env` (including secret-binding objects), falling back to `$env/dynamic/private` outside a request context. Result is validated once and cached.

```ts
function makePrivate<S extends ZodRawShape>(schema: ZodObject<S>): () => Promise<z.infer<ZodObject<S>>>;
const Env: { makePrivate: typeof makePrivate };
```

Throws on validation failure with a joined `path: message` list.

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/form`

Result type and Zod schema helpers for use with SvelteKit remote forms and the `components/form` field components.

#### `FormResult`

```ts
type FormResponseType = 'error' | 'ok' | 'warning';
type FormResult<T> = { data: T; message?: string; type: FormResponseType };

const FormResult = {
  errData<T>(info: { data: T; message?: string }): FormResult<T>;
  err(message?: string): FormResult<void>;
  warnData<T>(info: { data: T; message?: string }): FormResult<T>;
  warn(message?: string): FormResult<void>;
  okData<T>(info: { data: T; message?: string }): FormResult<T>;
  ok(message?: string): FormResult<void>;
};
```

Return one of these from a remote `form()` action; `Form`'s `onSuccess`/`onWarning`/`onError` and its automatic toast are driven by the `type`.

#### Schema helpers

```ts
function nullable<T extends z.ZodType<unknown, number | string>>(schema: T): z.ZodType<null | z.infer<T>, number | string>;
const formText: z.ZodString;               // trim + min(1)
const formEmail: z.ZodString;               // z.email()
const formBoolean: z.ZodType<boolean, boolean | undefined>; // defaults to false
const formInt: z.ZodType<number, number | string>;   // any finite number
const formNumber: z.ZodType<number, number | string>; // formInt piped to .min(0)
const formDate: z.ZodType<CalendarDate, string>;      // parses "YYYY-MM-DD"
const formTime: z.ZodType<Time, string>;              // parses "HH:mm"
const formFile: z.ZodType<File>;            // instanceof File, size > 0
const formHexColor: z.ZodString;            // ^[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$ (6-digit only)
function formPin(length?: number): z.ZodString;       // default length 6
function formSelect<T extends readonly [string, ...string[]]>(options: T): z.ZodEnum<...>;
```

`nullable` wraps a string/number schema so an empty form field, `null`, or `undefined` all normalize to `null` — for optional scalar fields shared between a `<Form>` and a JSON body.

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/email`

AWS SES email sending via Web Crypto API (Cloudflare Workers compatible).

```ts
interface SendEmailOptions {
  awsAccessKeyId: string;
  awsRegion: string;
  awsSecretAccessKey: string;
  from: string;
  fromName?: string;
  to: string | string[];
  cc?: string | string[];
  bcc?: string | string[];
  replyTo?: string | string[];
  subject: string;
  text?: string;
  html?: string;
}

function sendEmail(options: SendEmailOptions): Promise<string>;
```

Returns the SES `MessageId` on success.

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/functional`

Functional programming utilities.

#### `Result`

A discriminated union type for error handling without exceptions.

```ts
type Result<T, E> = { ok: true; value: T } | { ok: false; error: E };

const Result = {
  ok<T>(value: T): { ok: true; value: T };
  err<E>(error: E): { ok: false; error: E };
  isOk<T, E>(result: Result<T, E>): result is { ok: true; value: T };
  isErr<T, E>(result: Result<T, E>): result is { ok: false; error: E };
  unwrapOr<T, E>(result: Result<T, E>, defaultValue: T): T;
  unwrapOrElse<T, E>(result: Result<T, E>, op: (error: E) => T): T;
  map<T, U, E>(result: Result<T, E>, fn: (val: T) => U): Result<U, E>;
  mapErr<T, E, F>(result: Result<T, E>, fn: (err: E) => F): Result<T, F>;
  andThen<T, U, E>(result: Result<T, E>, op: (val: T) => Result<U, E>): Result<U, E>;
  orElse<T, E, F>(result: Result<T, E>, op: (err: E) => Result<T, F>): Result<T, F>;
  match<T, E, R>(result: Result<T, E>, arms: { ok: (val: T) => R; err: (err: E) => R }): R;
};
```

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/server/form-handler`

Legacy `sveltekit-superforms`-based server-side form handling helpers for `+page.server.ts` actions. Not related to the remote-form `Form`/field components above, which use `utils/form`'s `FormResult` instead.

```ts
function errorMessage<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(
  form: SuperValidated<T>,
  options?: { data?: unknown; showToast?: boolean; text?: string }
): ActionResult;

function successMessage<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(
  form: SuperValidated<T>,
  options?: { data?: unknown; showToast?: boolean; text?: string }
): ActionResult;

function failFormValidation<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(
  form: SuperValidated<T>
): ActionFailure<{ form: SuperValidated<T> }>;

function handleDbErrorForm<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(
  form: SuperValidated<T>,
  message: string,
  err: unknown
): ActionFailure<{ form: SuperValidated<T> }>;

function isDuplicateDbError(err: unknown): boolean;
```

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/server/form-processor`

Legacy `sveltekit-superforms`-based server-side form validation.

```ts
function processForm<S extends z.ZodType<Record<string, unknown>>>(
  request: Request,
  schema: S
): Promise<SuperValidated<Infer<S, 'zod4'>>>;
```

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/remote`

Server-side SvelteKit remote function helpers with guard patterns.

#### Types

```ts
type ResponseError = { code: number; message: string };
type CheckFunction = () => Promise<CheckResult>;
type CheckResult = Result<void, ResponseError>;
type CommandSuccess = { message: string };
type CommandResult<T extends CommandSuccess> = Result<T, ResponseError>;

const CheckResult = {
  ok(): { ok: true; value: void };
  enforceOk(r: CheckResult): void; // throws SvelteKit error if result is Err
};
```

#### Guarded Remote Functions

Wrap SvelteKit `command`, `query`, and `form` remote functions with authorization checks.

All guarded functions run the `CheckFunction` before the handler. On check failure, `guardedCommand` and `guardedCommandVoid` return a `Result.err` (commands cannot throw SvelteKit errors); all others throw via `CheckResult.enforceOk`.

```ts
function guardedCommand<Schema extends StandardSchemaV1, Output extends CommandSuccess>(
  check: CheckFunction,
  schema: Schema,
  fn: (output: StandardSchemaV1.InferOutput<Schema>) => Promise<CommandResult<Output>>
): RemoteCommand<StandardSchemaV1.InferInput<Schema>, Promise<CommandResult<Output>>>;

function guardedCommandVoid<Output extends CommandSuccess>(
  check: CheckFunction,
  fn: () => Promise<CommandResult<Output>>
): RemoteCommand<void, Promise<CommandResult<Output>>>;

function guardedForm<
  Schema extends StandardSchemaV1<RemoteFormInput, Record<string, unknown>>,
  Output
>(
  schema: Schema,
  check: CheckFunction,
  fn: (
    output: StandardSchemaV1.InferOutput<Schema>,
    issue: InvalidField<StandardSchemaV1.InferInput<Schema>>
  ) => Promise<Output>
): RemoteForm<StandardSchemaV1.InferInput<Schema>, Output>;

function guardedFormVoid<Output>(
  check: CheckFunction,
  fn: () => Promise<Output>
): RemoteForm<void, Output>;

function guardedQuery<Schema extends StandardSchemaV1, Output>(
  check: CheckFunction,
  schema: Schema,
  fn: (output: StandardSchemaV1.InferOutput<Schema>) => Promise<Output>
): RemoteQueryFunction<StandardSchemaV1.InferInput<Schema>, Output>;

function guardedQueryVoid<Output>(
  check: CheckFunction,
  fn: () => Promise<Output>
): RemoteQueryFunction<void, Output>;
```

---

### `@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/command`

Client-side handler for command remote functions. Manages submission state, toast notifications, and callbacks.

#### `CommandActionState`

Stateful client handler — holds reactive `input` and executes with it.

```ts
class CommandActionState<S, O extends CommandSuccess> {
  input: S; // reactive ($state), set before calling execute()

  get submitting(): boolean; // reactive, true while a request is in-flight

  constructor(
    remote: RemoteCommand<S, Promise<CommandResult<O>>>,
    defaultInput: S,
    config?: {
      onError?: (error: ResponseError) => void;
      onSuccess?: (state: { input: S; result: O }) => void;
      toastError?: boolean;   // default: true
      toastSuccess?: boolean; // default: true
    }
  );

  execute(): Promise<void>; // executes with this.input
}
```

#### `CommandAction`

Stateless client handler — `execute` takes input directly.

```ts
class CommandAction<S, O extends CommandSuccess> {
  get submitting(): boolean; // reactive, true while a request is in-flight

  constructor(
    remote: RemoteCommand<S, Promise<CommandResult<O>>>,
    config?: {
      onError?: (error: ResponseError) => void;
      onSuccess?: (state: { input: S; result: O }) => void;
      toastError?: boolean;   // default: true
      toastSuccess?: boolean; // default: true
    }
  );

  execute(input: S): Promise<void>;
}
```

#### `CommandActionVoid`

Client handler for input-less command remote functions.

```ts
class CommandActionVoid<O extends CommandSuccess> {
  get submitting(): boolean; // reactive, true while a request is in-flight

  constructor(
    remote: RemoteCommand<void, Promise<CommandResult<O>>>,
    config?: {
      onError?: (error: ResponseError) => void;
      onSuccess?: (result: O) => void;
      toastError?: boolean;   // default: true
      toastSuccess?: boolean; // default: true
    }
  );

  execute(): Promise<void>;
}
```

Both classes catch network errors as `Result.err({ code: 500, message: 'Internal Server Error' })`. On success they toast `result.message` and call `onSuccess`. On error they toast the error and call `onError`.

---

## Usage Example

`schema.ts`:

```ts
import { formDate } from '@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/form';
import { z } from 'zod/v4';

export const Schema = z.object({
  name: z.string().min(1),
  age: z.int().min(0),
  date: formDate
});
```

`data.remote.ts`:

```ts
import { form } from '$app/server';

import { FormResult } from '@webamoki/web-svelte/utils/form';

import { Schema } from './schema.js';

export const submitForm = form(Schema, async (data) => {
  // ...persist data...
  return FormResult.ok('Saved');
});
```

`+page.svelte`:

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { Button, DateField, Form, NumberField, TextField } from '@webamoki/web-svelte/components/form';

  import { submitForm } from './data.remote.js';
  import { Schema } from './schema.js';
</script>

<Form form={submitForm} schema={Schema}>
  <TextField form={submitForm} name="name">Name</TextField>
  <NumberField form={submitForm} name="age">Age</NumberField>
  <DateField form={submitForm} name="date">Date</DateField>
  <Button form={submitForm}>Submit</Button>
</Form>
```
